---
title: "Assignment2"
format: html
author: "Siyuan Yin"
---


# Main branch section
# Test branch section

# ploting section

```{r}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

marketing_data <- read_csv("data/32876793_Siyuan Yin.csv")

ggplot(marketing_data, aes(x = segment, y = purchase_amount)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Purchase Amount by Customer Segment",
    x = "Customer Segment",
    y = "Purchase Amount"
  )
```
